name: Outlier Detection
author: VARA Team
description: Finds YouTube videos that significantly outperformed their channel size — revealing content opportunities in any niche.

quotaProfile.breakdown: 100 units (search) + 1 unit per channel lookup (up to 20)

inputSchema.maxChannelSize: number (default: 500000) — exclude channels above this subscriber count
inputSchema.maxAgeDays: number (default: 730) — only include videos uploaded within this many days
inputSchema.includeLlmInsights: boolean (default: false) — generate AI insights for top 5 outliers (Creator tier)
